text:
Class: Entity
Chinese: 实体
English: Entity
Layer: 
Parent: None
Definition: Top-level abstraction for all identifiable and manageable things
Definition (ZH): 所有可被识别和管理的事物的顶层抽象
Children: Party, Resource
Attributes: name (string); description (string)

Class: Party
Chinese: 主体
English: Party
Layer: 
Parent: Entity
Definition: The superclass of all entities that can participate in business and governance relationships
Definition (ZH): 可参与业务关系与治理关系的主体总类
Children: Person, Organization
Outgoing relations: plays_role -> Role; owns -> Resource

Class: Person
Chinese: 人员
English: Person
Layer: 
Parent: Party
Definition: A natural person entity
Definition (ZH): 自然人主体
Attributes: email (string)

Class: Organization
Chinese: 组织
English: Organization
Layer: 
Parent: Party
Definition: A legal or non-legal organization entity
Definition (ZH): 法人或非法人组织
Children: OrgUnit
Instances: Acme Corporation

Class: OrgUnit
Chinese: 组织单元
English: Organizational Unit
Layer: 
Parent: Organization
Definition: Internal organizational units such as departments, teams, committees, and program groups
Definition (ZH): 部门、团队、委员会、项目群等组织内部单元
Instances: Operations Department

Class: Resource
Chinese: 资源
English: Resource
Layer: 
Parent: Entity
Definition: Tangible or intangible resources created, modified, managed, or consumed by business processes
Definition (ZH): 被业务过程创建、变更、管理、消费的有形或无形资源
Children: ProductService, Asset, DataObject, SystemApplication
Incoming relations: Party -> owns; Process -> consumes; Process -> produces

Class: ProductService
Chinese: 产品和服务
English: Product & Service
Layer: 
Parent: Resource
Definition: Products and services provided externally or used internally by an enterprise
Definition (ZH): 企业对外提供或内部使用的产品和服务对象

Class: Asset
Chinese: 资产
English: Asset
Layer: 
Parent: Resource
Definition: Financial, physical, knowledge, data, brand, and other assets
Definition (ZH): 财务、实物、知识、数据、品牌等资产

Class: DataObject
Chinese: 数据对象
English: Data Object
Layer: 
Parent: Resource
Definition: A structured or unstructured data entity
Definition (ZH): 结构化或非结构化的数据实体
Children: Document
Outgoing relations: recorded_in -> SystemApplication

Class: Document
Chinese: 文档与记录
English: Document
Layer: 
Parent: DataObject
Definition: Contracts, reports, files, documents, and records
Definition (ZH): 合同、报告、文件、单据、记录

Class: SystemApplication
Chinese: 系统应用
English: System Application
Layer: 
Parent: Resource
Definition: Software systems supporting processes, data, and decision-making
Definition (ZH): 支撑流程、数据和决策的软件系统
Incoming relations: DataObject -> recorded_in
Instances: Enterprise Resource Planning System

Class: Governance
Chinese: 治理
English: Governance
Layer: 
Parent: None
Definition: Abstract domain for constraints, governance, and risk management
Definition (ZH): 用于约束、治理和风险管控的抽象域
Children: Policy, Rule, Control, Risk
Incoming relations: Operational -> governed_by

Class: Policy
Chinese: 政策
English: Policy
Layer: 
Parent: Governance
Definition: Management principles and constraint requirements
Definition (ZH): 管理原则与约束要求
Attributes: effective_date (date)

Class: Rule
Chinese: 规则
English: Rule
Layer: 
Parent: Governance
Definition: Executable and evaluable business or control rules
Definition (ZH): 可执行、可判断的业务或控制规则

Class: Control
Chinese: 控制
English: Control
Layer: 
Parent: Governance
Definition: Control measures to reduce risk and ensure compliance and quality
Definition (ZH): 用于降低风险、保障合规和质量的控制措施
Incoming relations: Risk -> mitigated_by

Class: Risk
Chinese: 风险
English: Risk
Layer: 
Parent: Governance
Definition: Uncertain events or conditions that may affect goal achievement
Definition (ZH): 可能影响目标实现的不确定事件或状态
Outgoing relations: mitigated_by -> Control
Attributes: severity (enum)

Class: Operational
Chinese: 运营
English: Operational
Layer: 
Parent: None
Definition: Abstract domain describing how an organization operates, including roles, capabilities, processes, and events
Definition (ZH): 描述组织运作方式的抽象域，包含角色、能力、流程与事件
Children: Role, Capability, Process, Event
Outgoing relations: governed_by -> Governance; measured_by -> KPI
Incoming relations: Role -> accountable_for

Class: Role
Chinese: 角色
English: Role
Layer: 
Parent: Operational
Definition: An identity or responsibility assumed by a party in a given context
Definition (ZH): 主体在某一上下文中承担的身份或职责
Outgoing relations: accountable_for -> Operational
Incoming relations: Party -> plays_role
Instances: Chief Executive Officer

Class: Capability
Chinese: 能力
English: Capability
Layer: 
Parent: Operational
Definition: A stable and reusable business capability possessed by an organization
Definition (ZH): 组织稳定具备且可被复用的业务能力
Outgoing relations: realized_by -> Process
Instances: Supply Chain Management

Class: Process
Chinese: 流程
English: Process
Layer: 
Parent: Operational
Definition: An end-to-end sequence of activities defined to achieve business objectives; sub-activities expressed via part_of relation
Definition (ZH): 为实现业务目标而定义的端到端活动序列，可通过 part_of 关系表达子活动
Outgoing relations: consumes -> Resource; produces -> Resource
Incoming relations: Capability -> realized_by; Event -> triggered_by
Attributes: is_automated (boolean)
Instances: Order to Cash

Class: Event
Chinese: 事件
English: Event
Layer: 
Parent: Operational
Definition: A state change occurring in the business or technical environment
Definition (ZH): 发生在业务或技术环境中的状态变化
Outgoing relations: triggered_by -> Process

Class: Measurement
Chinese: 度量
English: Measurement
Layer: 
Parent: None
Definition: Abstract domain for goal-setting and performance measurement
Definition (ZH): 描述目标设定与绩效衡量的抽象域
Children: Goal, KPI

Class: Goal
Chinese: 目标
English: Goal
Layer: 
Parent: Measurement
Definition: Outcomes an organization aims to achieve
Definition (ZH): 组织希望达成的结果
Incoming relations: KPI -> evaluates
Instances: Revenue Growth

Class: KPI
Chinese: 关键指标
English: Key Performance Indicator
Layer: 
Parent: Measurement
Definition: Metrics that measure the degree of goal achievement
Definition (ZH): 衡量目标达成程度的指标
Outgoing relations: evaluates -> Goal
Incoming relations: Operational -> measured_by
Attributes: target_value (decimal); unit (string)
Instances: Customer Satisfaction Score
